heading: Leveraging smart manufacturing infrastructure at National Laboratories
label: 18813 Leveraging smart manufacturing infrastructure at National Laboratories

D or an amendment by div. D of , including authority of Secretary of Labor, see .Pub. L. 117–58section 18851 of this title
amendments: Wage Rate RequirementsFor provisions relating to rates of wages to be paid to laborers and mechanics on projects for construction, alteration, or repair work funded under div. D or an amendment by div. D of , including authority of Secretary of Labor, see .Pub. L. 117–58section 18851 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall conduct a study on how the Department can increase access to existing high-performance computing resources in the National Laboratories, particularly for small and medium manufacturers.November 15, 2021

children.label: A
children.text: focus on increasing access to the computing facilities of the National Laboratories; and

children.label: i
children.text: the information from the manufacturer is protected; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the security of the National Laboratory facility is maintained.

children.heading: Report
children.label: 3 Report
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall submit to Congress a report describing the results of the study.November 15, 2021

children.heading: Actions for increased access
children.label: b Actions for increased access
children.text: The Secretary shall facilitate access to the National Laboratories studied under subsection (a) for small and medium manufacturers so that small and medium manufacturers can fully use the high-performance computing resources of the National Laboratories to enhance the manufacturing competitiveness of the United States.
